description: Unique identifier for each candidate (format: CAND-XXXXXX)
Gender of the candidate (Male / Female / Non-Binary)
Highest academic degree obtained (e.g., B.Tech, M.Tech, MBA, Ph.D)
Field of specialization (e.g., Computer Science, Data Science, Finance)
Tier of the university attended (Tier 1 / Tier 2 / Tier 3)
Number of academic or personal projects completed (0-20)
Expected annual salary in Lakhs Per Annum (3.0-35.0 LPA)
Target variable - whether the candidate was selected (Yes / No)
